title: Fibonacci Dizisi
subtitle: Iteratif ve recursive fibonacci hesaplama.
code:
<?php

function fibonacciIterative(int $n): int {
    if ($n <= 1) return $n;

    $a = 0;
    $b = 1;
    for ($i = 2; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        $temp = $a + $b;
        $a = $b;
        $b = $temp;
    }
    return $b;
}

function fibonacciRecursive(int $n): int {
    if ($n <= 1) return $n;
    return fibonacciRecursive($n - 1) + fibonacciRecursive($n - 2);
}

echo "Iteratif Fibonacci (0-10):\n";
for ($i = 0; $i <= 10; $i++) {
    echo fibonacciIterative($i) . " ";
}
echo "\n";

echo "\nRecursive Fibonacci (0-10):\n";
for ($i = 0; $i <= 10; $i++) {
    echo fibonacciRecursive($i) . " ";
}
echo "\n";

echo "\n20. Fibonacci sayisi: " . fibonacciIterative(20) . "\n";

?>
